name: story-planner
description: Story planning and beat sheet management. Create, track, and revise plot structures using established frameworks (three-act, hero's journey, save the cat, etc.).
author: Cocapn

commands.name: plan:new
commands.description: Start a new story plan with a chosen structural framework

commands.name: plan:beat
commands.description: Add or update a beat in the current story plan
commands.example: plan:beat "midpoint" "Maren discovers the survey company has always known about the maps' power"

commands.name: plan:scene
commands.description: Add a scene to a beat, with goal/conflict/disaster structure
commands.example: plan:scene "fun-and-games" "Maren tests her power by drawing a small change to a tide pool"

commands.name: plan:list
commands.description: List all beats in the current story plan with completion status

commands.name: plan:gaps
commands.description: Analyze the current plan for structural gaps or pacing issues

commands.name: plan:timeline
commands.description: Show the story's timeline with events in chronological order

commands.name: plan:export
commands.description: Export the story plan as markdown or JSON
